message.content:
Find the service that reads internal serial numbers based on scanner array order:

1. Search for services (likely in Services/ or similar directory) that read scanner data or serial numbers
2. Look for code that queries Part_Operation_Serialization_Array_Index table
3. Find where ToIndex, Row, Col are used to determine serial number reading order
4. Understand how the service currently determines which serialization order to use
5. Look for any machine-specific or area-specific logic in the service

Focus on: Service layer code that uses the scanner array index for serial number processing.

   350→    Private Sub ReceivedDataWrite(receivedData As String)
   351→
   352→        'tmrKeyence.Stop()
   353→
   354→        If receivedData.Length > 10 Then
   355→
   356→            Dim items = receivedData.Trim.Split(",")
   357→
   358→            For Each item In items
   359→
   360→                Dim parts = item.Split(":")
   361→
   362→                If parts.Length = 3 Then
   363→
   364→                    Dim ssn As String = parts(0)
   365→
   366→                    Dim positionID As String = parts(1)
   367→
   368→                    Dim MasterID As String = parts(2)
   369→
   370→                    Dim selected = dt_array.Select("MasterID='" & MasterID & "' AND PositionID='" & positionID & "'")
   371→
   372→                    If selected.Length > 0 Then
   373→
   374→                        selected(0)("SSN") = ssn
   375→
   376→                    End If
   377→
   378→                    dt_array.AcceptChanges()
   379→
   380→                End If
   381→            Next
   382→        End If
   383→    End Sub
   384→
   385→    Private Squares As List(Of SquareItem) = Nothing
   386→
   387→    Private Class SquareItem
   388→        Property Bounds As Rectangle
   389→        Property Clicked As Boolean
   390→        Property ClickedColor As Color
   391→    End Class
   392→
   393→    Public Sub loadEmptyTable()
   394→        ExData.ChildsSerials.Clear()
   395→
   396→        dt_array = BeConn.GetDt("SELECT [AutoID],[PartID],[MasterID],[PositionID],[ToIndex],'' as SSN,[Col],[Row] FROM [Part_Operation_Serialization_Array_Index]  WHERE PartID='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartID & "' Order by ToIndex ASC")
   397→
   398→        dgvlist.DataSource = dt_array
   399→
   400→        dgvlist.Columns("AutoID").Visible = False
   401→        dgvlist.Columns("PartID").Visible = False
   402→        dgvlist.Columns("MasterID").Visible = False
   403→        dgvlist.Columns("PositionID").Visible = False
   404→        dgvlist.Columns("Col").Visible = False
   405→        dgvlist.Columns("Row").Visible = False
   406→
   407→        Dim cols As Integer = BeConn.GetInteger("SELECT MAX(Col) FROM [Part_Operation_Serialization_Array_Index] WHERE PartID='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartID & "'")
   408→
   409→        Dim Rows As Integer = BeConn.GetInteger("SELECT MAX(Row) FROM [Part_Operation_Serialization_Array_Index] WHERE PartID='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartID & "'")
   410→
   411→        pnlLayer.Controls.Clear()
   412→
   413→        Try
   414→            Squares = New List(Of SquareItem)
   415→
   416→            Dim SquareSpacing As Integer = 2
   417→
   418→            Dim SquaresPerRow As Integer = cols
   419→
   420→            Dim TotalRows = Rows
   421→
   422→            Dim SquareEdgeLength As Integer = Math.Ceiling((pnlLayer.Width - (SquareSpacing * SquaresPerRow)) \ SquaresPerRow)
   423→
   424→            Dim SquareEdgeLengthH As Integer = Math.Ceiling((pnlLayer.Height - (SquareSpacing * TotalRows)) \ TotalRows)
   425→
   426→            If SquareEdgeLength > 0 And SquareEdgeLengthH > 0 Then
   427→
   428→                Dim SquareSize As New Size(SquareEdgeLength, SquareEdgeLength)
   429→
   430→                Dim RowPoint As Integer = 1
   431→
   432→                Dim ColPoint As Integer = 1
   433→
   434→                Dim itemno As Integer = 1
   435→
   436→                For i As Integer = 1 To TotalRows
   437→
   438→                    ColPoint = 1
   439→
   440→                    For j As Integer = 1 To SquaresPerRow
   441→                        Dim smlpanel As Panel = New Panel()
   442→
   443→                        smlpanel.Width = SquareEdgeLength
   444→
   445→                        smlpanel.Height = SquareEdgeLengthH
   446→
   447→                        smlpanel.Location = New Point(ColPoint, RowPoint)
   448→
   449→                        ColPoint = ColPoint + (SquareEdgeLength + SquareSpacing)
   450→
   451→                        smlpanel.BackColor = Color.Gray
   452→
   453→                        smlpanel.Margin = New Padding(0, 0, 0, 0)
   454→
   455→                        smlpanel.Name = "arrayUnit_" & i & "_" & j
   456→
   457→                        Dim toIndex As String = ""
   458→
   459→                        Dim selected = dt_array.Select("Row='" & i & "' AND Col='" & j & "'")
   460→
   461→                        If selected.Length > 0 Then
   462→                            toIndex = selected(0)("ToIndex").ToString()
   463→
   464→                            If toIndex = 1 Then
   465→                                smlpanel.BackColor = Color.Yellow
   466→                            End If
   467→                        End If
   468→
   469→                        'Agregar texto de orden
   470→
   471→                        Dim smltexto As Label = New Label
   472→
   473→                        smltexto.Dock = DockStyle.None
   474→                        smltexto.Anchor = AnchorStyles.None
   475→
   476→                        smltexto.ForeColor = Color.White
   477→
   478→                        smltexto.Font = New Font("Segoe UI", smlpanel.Height - 4, FontStyle.Regular)
   479→
   480→                        smltexto.Text = toIndex
   481→
   482→                        smlpanel.Controls.Add(smltexto)
   483→

   771→        lblNo.Text = "-"

   777→    Private Sub btnManual_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnManual.Click
   778→        loadEmptyTable()
   779→        CurrentIndex = 0
   780→
   781→        Dim contador As Integer = ExFunctions.getMergeCounter(ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartID)
   782→        Dim dt = DateTime.Now
   783→        Dim jDate = String.Format("{0}{1}", dt.ToString("yy"), dt.DayOfYear.ToString("000"))
   784→        ExData.parenssn = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartNumber.Substring(3, 5) & "-" & jDate & contador.ToString("00000")
   785→
   786→        If txtParent.Text.Length > 0 Then
   787→            Dim childParentVarcharParameter() As SqlParameter = New SqlParameter() _
   788→                        {
   789→                            New SqlParameter("@Parente", SqlDbType.VarChar) With {.Value = txtParent.Text.Replace("'", "")}
   790→                        }
   791→
   792→            Dim dtparent As DataTable = BeConn.GetDt("SELECT [Parente]  FROM [PD_tbl_parents_smt] where parente =@Parente", childParentVarcharParameter)
   793→            If dtparent.Rows.Count > 0 Then
   794→                MsgBox("Parent duplicated")
   795→                KeyenceReader.ExecCommand("LOFF", 2000)
   796→                txtParent.Text = ""
   797→                txtParent.Select()
   798→                Exit Sub
   799→            Else
   800→                ExData.parenssn = txtParent.Text
   801→            End If
   802→        End If
   803→
   804→        tblManual.Enabled = True
   805→
   806→        CurrentIndex = 1
   807→        lblNo.Text = CurrentIndex
   808→
   809→        'painttable()
   810→
   811→        txt_serial.Text = ""
   812→        txt_serial.Select()
   813→
   814→    End Sub
   815→
   816→
   817→    Private Sub txt_serial_KeyPress(sender As Object, e As KeyPressEventArgs) Handles txt_serial.KeyPress
   818→        If e.KeyChar = Convert.ToChar(13) Then
   819→            btnaddm.PerformClick()
   820→        End If
   821→    End Sub
   822→
   823→    Private Sub btnaddm_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnaddm.Click
   824→        Dim ssn As String = txt_serial.Text.Replace("'", "").ToUpper
   825→
   826→        serialescazados = 0
   827→
   828→        If chMoveParent.Checked Then
   829→            Dim ssnVarcharParameter() As SqlParameter = New SqlParameter() _
   830→                {
   831→                    New SqlParameter("@SSN", SqlDbType.VarChar) With {.Value = ssn}
   832→                }
   833→
   834→            Dim dtParent As DataTable = BeConn.GetDt("SELECT [Parente] ,[Child] ,[Sort_No] FROM [PD_tbl_parents_smt] WHERE Child=@SSN", ssnVarcharParameter)
   835→
   836→            If dtParent.Rows.Count > 0 Then
   837→                ExData.parenssn = dtParent.Rows(0).Item("Parente")
   838→                For Each rowChil As DataRow In dtParent.Rows
   839→                    ExData.ChildsSerials.Rows.Add(rowChil.Item("Child"))
   840→                    serialescazados = serialescazados + ExFunctions.getMergeQty(rowChil.Item("Child"), ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartIdFormat)
   841→                Next
   842→            Else
   843→                MsgBox("Panel no cazado")
   844→            End If
   845→        Else
   846→            'Agregar a lista hasta acompletar cantidad de seriales
   847→            Dim rows() = ExData.ChildsSerials.Select("`Child`='" & ssn & "'")
   848→            If rows.Length = 0 Then
   849→                Dim regex1 As Regex
   850→                regex1 = New Regex(ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartIdFormat)
   851→                Dim match As Match = regex1.Match(ssn)
   852→                If match.Success Then
   853→                    If ExFunctions.getMergeQty(ssn, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartIdFormat) = 0 Then
   854→                        ExData.ChildsSerials.Rows.Add(ssn)
   855→
   856→                        Dim selected = dt_array.Select("ToIndex='" & CurrentIndex & "'")
   857→
   858→                        If selected.Length > 0 Then
   859→                            selected(0)("SSN") = ssn
   860→                        End If
   861→
   862→                        dt_array.AcceptChanges()
   863→
   864→                        painttable()
   865→                        CurrentIndex += 1
   866→                    End If
   867→                End If
   868→            End If
   869→        End If
   870→
   871→        txt_serial.Text = ""
   872→        txt_serial.Select()
   873→
   874→        If ExData.ChildsSerials.Rows.Count = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.pzspanel Then
   875→            tblManual.Enabled = False
   876→            If serialescazados > 0 And chMoveParent.Checked = False Then
   877→                ShowMSG(My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_merge_ready3 & serialescazados & My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_merge_ready4, My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_merge_ready)
   878→            ElseIf serialescazados = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.pzspanel And chMoveParent.Checked = True Then
   879→                publicar()
   880→
   881→            Else
   882→                publicar()
   883→
   884→            End If
   885→        End If
   886→    End Sub
   887→
   888→    Private Sub txtParent_KeyPress(sender As Object, e As KeyPressEventArgs) Handles txtParent.KeyPress
   889→        If e.KeyChar = Convert.ToChar(13) Then
   890→            TgrBtn.PerformClick()
   891→        End If
   892→    End Sub
   893→End Class
